text:
D0200H2 Resident Mood Interview - Movement Different Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident's movement and speech is different (slow or fidgety or restless). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
134 D0200I1_NGTV_STATE_CD D0200I1_NGTV_STATE_CD D0200I1 Resident Mood Interview - Negative
